column7: Enhances leaf area and light interception; top-dress at active tillering for optimum tiller production.
Enhances seedling establishment and root growth; potassium improves early drought stress tolerance.
Supports sustained canopy greenness; S component improves N utilization efficiency.
Improves stress tolerance; K supports high yield stability across different soil conditions.
Triacontanol enhances photosynthesis under field conditions; biostimulant reduces heat/drought stress impact on yield.
Algae-derived biostimulants improve stress tolerance; nano-nutrient delivery reduces fertilizer application frequency.
Root exudate activity improves soil aggregation; enhances water-holding capacity in sandy or degraded paddy soils.
Biological N fixation supplements chemical N; Azolla biomass improves soil moisture retention for irrigated inbred.
Foliar NPK at critical stages improves nutrient uptake efficiency; reduces total fertilizer input while maintaining yield.
